expectations.evidence: Step 4: Agent lists all R-entries by title (titles_only=true) and spots R0025: 'H-Entry Schema: Standard-Struktur für Human-Context-Einträge', then reads it fully.

expectations.text: Agent tries at least 2 different search terms before giving up or succeeding
expectations.evidence: 6 searches before finding: 'H-Standardschema H-Entry Schema', 'Schema Dokumentation Entry-Format Standardschema', 'H-Schema Standardschema', 'Entry Schema Format Felder', 'H-Entry Human Schema Struktur', then R-prefix listing.

expectations.text: Agent does NOT report 'nichts gefunden' after a single null result
expectations.evidence: Agent kept trying multiple variations after each null result — no premature giveup.
